candidates.why: Separate operating D&A summary row above EBIT, but it is not identified as COGS/cost-of-sales related relative to selected COGS row 'Handelsvaror'. Conservatively avoid assigning broad operating D&A to COGS without explicit COGS linkage.
Generic D&A component row with no explicit COGS linkage; could be part of the operating D&A summary rather than COGS-specific depreciation.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is only 'Handelsvaror'. No explicit depreciation/amortisation row is labelled as belonging to cost of sales / cost of revenues, so no separate COGS D&A row should be added.

candidates.why: This is the operating D&A summary row above EBIT. It sits separately from the selected XSGA component rows 'Övriga externa kostnader' and 'Personalkostnader', so it appears not embedded in those selected rows. It also matches the sum of the detailed D&A component rows in 2023, so it should be preferred over components to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit R&D-related amortisation row above EBIT, potentially relevant to SG&A/R&D. However it appears to be a component of the broader D&A summary row, so it should not be selected when the summary row is available.
Generic D&A component row, but it appears to be one of the detailed components captured by the broader operating D&A summary row.

variables.notes: Use the summary D&A row only. It is a separate operating expense line above EBIT and appears outside the selected XSGA component rows, so it should be added separately later. Do not also include the component amortisation/depreciation rows.
